asset.title: L2 Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the Compare-And-Set (CAS) edit protocol on a spreadsheet cell. It step-by-steps through reading, locking, writing, and releasing, though it contains minor placeholder steps.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step annotations clearly explain the CAS (Compare-And-Set) mechanism on the Net Income cell.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire lifecycle from initial state, read, lock, write, and final committed state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear row highlighting, though highly schematic.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and versioned data model of NodeRoom.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a stylized UI replay or high-fidelity mockup animation rather than a raw app capture.

legibility.evidence: Text and status chips are highly legible with strong contrast.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating transactional integrity in financial spreadsheet workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the logical steps of a CAS operation without overclaiming.

observedEvidence: Cell locking and versioning visualization (V1 to V2)
Status indicators for COMMITTED and LOCKED states

defects.observed: The AI action label briefly shows 'say' with no descriptive text.
defects.fix: Provide descriptive text for step 2/7 or remove the empty placeholder step.

defects.observed: The AI action label shows 'say' with no descriptive text before the final step.
defects.fix: Provide descriptive text for step 6/7 or remove the empty placeholder step.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom's L2 Edit protocol uses Compare-And-Set (CAS) to safely lock, edit, and version spreadsheet cells without clobbering concurrent updates.
